title: Vijay’s ‘Jana Nayagan’ leaked online: Rajinikanth, Kamal Haasan, Chiranjeevi slam piracy
description: Reacting to the news of Tamil superstar Vijay’s ‘Jana Nayagan’ being leaked online, celebrities such as Rajinikanth, Kamal Haasan, Chiranjeevi, Vijay Deverakonda, and Suriya took to social media to slam piracy
